description: Execute a complete Procure-to-Pay cycle for GardenWorld (Organization: HQ) involving vendor 'Tree Farm Inc.' The cycle comprises: a completed Purchase Order with two lines (25 units of 'Oak Tree' and 40 units of 'Holly Bush') at the Purchase price list's default prices, a completed Material Receipt for all ordered items, a completed Vendor Invoice matching the PO lines and prices, a completed AP Payment for the full invoice amount via the MoneyBank checking account (Account No. 1234, check number 'CHK-P2P-2026-001'), and a Payment Allocation tying the payment to the invoice with zero outstanding balance. All documents must be in Completed status. Login credentials: GardenAdmin / GardenAdmin.
